## 👾 So you have an error huh?
You can describe it here. ***How?***

You can send an Image, or copy paste the error here,

## ✅ Tips:
**It will be of great help if you describe the error to me in detail.**
Like **what tool you select?**
**What did you type on the keyboard** before the error appeared?

***Example:***
```
Error -> [!!!] Another error has occurred, ERROR
Tool -> Deep Search
Keyboard or input -> books
```
